heroHeadline: GSF at ~195 Personnel as 13,000+ Displaced From Artibonite; IMF Confirms Haiti Met End-2025 Economic Targets
heroSubtitle: IOM ETT 88.2 (Apr 7) documented 13,000+ newly displaced from Gran Grif's March 28–30 Artibonite offensive; Guatemala completed its 75-troop GSF deployment on April 2, bringing the advance force to ~195; a CNN investigation (Apr 6) found children make up ~50% of gang membership, raising humanitarian concerns for upcoming GSF operations; the IMF confirmed Haiti met all end-2025 staff-monitored program targets despite ongoing security and governance challenges; the full 5,550-person GSF force not expected until October 2026
footerNote: Data sourced from UN BINUH, OHCHR, OCHA, IOM, Reuters, AP, Miami Herald, Al Jazeera, France 24, Le Nouvelliste, ACLED, ICG, HRW, WFP, Haitian Times, Jamaica Observer, RNDDH, PassBlue, Amnesty International, IMF
